_readme: Labelled corpus for services/redact.py. Each entry is either SENSITIVE (something that
must be masked, with the type expected) or CLEAN (ordinary agent output that must survive
untouched). Rates are computed and asserted in tests/test_redaction_corpus.py and
The clean cases are the point. A masker is easy to make recall-perfect by masking
everything; what makes it usable is not destroying real output. Entries marked
'known_false_positive' are cases this regex-based masker currently gets wrong — they are
recorded rather than deleted so the number is honest and a future fix has a target.

clean.text: The capital of Iceland is Reykjavik.
Summarise the attached quarterly report in three bullets.
SELECT id, name FROM users WHERE active = true LIMIT 10
The build failed with exit code 137 (OOM killed).
Upgrade to version 2.14.3 to pick up the fix.
Latency p95 was 1450 ms across 20000 requests.
The function returns a 404 when the record is absent.
Use temperature 0.7 and top_p 0.95 for this task.
The customer asked about the refund policy for digital goods.

clean.note: a long digit run is shaped exactly like a card number to this regex; recorded rather than deleted so the published rate stays honest
